zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Chandler於1577年10月13日在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德受洗時，她的父親Tobias Chandler26歲，母親Johanna Momford25歲。她於1600年4月2日與Henry Monk在英國素瑞阿爾布瑞結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她於1631年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利並於1632年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利。她去世於1645年2月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年67歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利艾略特 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Chandler于1577年10月13日在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德受洗时，她的父亲Tobias Chandler26岁，母亲Johanna Momford25岁。她于1600年4月2日与Henry Monk在英国素瑞阿爾布瑞结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她于1631年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利并于1632年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利。她去世于1645年2月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年67岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利艾略特 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Chandler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a maker and seller of candles, from Anglo-Norman French chandeler ‘maker or seller of candles’ (Old French chandelier, Late Latin candelarius, a derivative of candela ‘candle’). While a medieval chandler no doubt made and sold other articles beside candles, the extended sense of modern English chandler does not occur until the 16th century. The name may also, more rarely, have denoted someone who was responsible for the lighting arrangements in a large house, or else one who owed rent in the form of wax or candles.

variants.name: Candler
meanings: English (East Anglia and southeastern England): variant of   Chandler  .
German: variant of Kandler and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Candler is very rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Oldest Grave seen in the Memorials Link.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Chandler was christened on 13 October 1577, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, her father, Tobias Chandler, was 26 and her mother, Johanna Momford, was 25. She married Henry Monk on 2 April 1600, in Albury, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She immigrated to Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1631 and lived in Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1632. She died on 3 February 1645, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 67, and was buried in Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Chandler a été baptisée le 13 octobre 1577, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Tobias Chandler, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Johanna Momford, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Monk le 2 avril 1600, à Albury, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle a immigré au Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1631 et a vécu à Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1632. Elle est décédée le 3 février 1645, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Chandler am 13. Oktober 1577 in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Tobias Chandler 26 und ihre Mutter Johanna Momford 25. Sie hat am 2. April 1600 in Albury, Surrey, England Henry Monk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie ist 1631 nach Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. 1632 hat sie in Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Sie starb am 3. Februar 1645 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Chandler è stato battezzato il 13 ottobre 1577 nel Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, Tobias Chandler, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Johanna Momford, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Henry Monk il 2 aprile 1600, nel Albury, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Immigrata nel Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1631 e vissuto a Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1632. Morì il 3 febbraio 1645, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.Albury, Surrey, England: イギリススリーアルブリー
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Chandlerが1577年10月13日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードで洗礼を受けた時，父Tobias Chandlerは26歳，母Johanna Momfordは25歳であった。1600年4月2日にイギリススリーアルブリーでHenry Monkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1631年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーロクスブリーに移住し，1632年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーロクスブリーに住んでいた。彼女は1645年2月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーで67歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンロクスブリーエリオト ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이
ko.Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 록스버이
ko.Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, S: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이 엘리엇 버이잉 그라운드
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Chandler(이)가 1577년 10월 13일 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Tobias Chandler(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Momford(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1600년 4월 2일 영국 수리 알버이에서 Henry Monk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1631년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 록스버이로 이민을 떠났고, 1632년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 록스버이에서 살았다. 그녀는 1645년 2월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이 엘리엇 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.13 October 1577–3 February 1645: 13 de outubro de 1577–3 de fevereiro de 1645
pt.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America

pt.Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, S: Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Chandler foi batizada em 13 de outubro de 1577, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Tobias Chandler, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Momford, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Monk em 2 de abril de 1600, em Albury, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela imigrou para o Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1631 e viveu em Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1632. Ela faleceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1645, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: роксбури, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, S: элиот буринг гроунд, роксбури, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Chandler была крещена 13 октября 1577 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Tobias Chandler было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Momford, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Monk 2 апреля 1600 г. в местности албури, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она иммигрировала в роксбури, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1631 году, а также жила в местности роксбури, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1632 году. Она умерла 3 февраля 1645 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности элиот буринг гроунд, роксбури, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Chandler se bautizó el 13 de octubre de 1577, en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Tobias Chandler, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Johanna Momford, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Henry Monk el 2 de abril de 1600, en Albury, Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Inmigró a Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1631 y vivió en Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1632. Murió el 3 de febrero de 1645, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
